blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,159 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
